btw do u wanna hear a fun lore: 
Mr.Dolly (pink sheep in Ardelia animation) is the Sovereign of Sheep in Terra (og Arknights world), he was friend with Adele's parents. Dolly is also a reference to the Dolly Cloning Experiment irl, thats why you see a lot of sheep spamming in Ardelia animation (also in og Arknights, Dolly has an ability to clone themselves into smaller sheeps act as their proxy)

also Surtr actually has completed lore lol ppl just DO NOT READ

the details of her past is not clear. But she is a Sarkaz and she used to live in Kazdel. "Laevatain" is a fragment of a Feranmut that was defeated by Sami (another Feranmut). This fragment then latched onto Surtr's sword, which later made Surtr memories went haywire because of the previous wielders' memories. In an event, she eventually did come home and saw her house in Kazdel, but because she simply felt nothing from looking at her past life, she decided to give up her past memories and move on with her new life.

Okay so
After playing Endfield a bit myself
I feel like it is really Xenoblade Chronicles the gacha game
But with worse combat
Endfield gets reverse powercrept by Xenoblade 2

Worse combat than Xenoblade 2
Worse exploration than Xenoblade X
😔
Chicken I haven’t been back here in a while u gonna have to elaborate

I would argue that
It is a masterpiece in its own right 
It feels the least as a Xenoblade Chronicles out of all the games in the series
But it gives you the best exploration and customisation of your character in exchange
It has a lot of mid to bad points, but the pros vastly overwhelm the cons
miss me with ANOTHER open world game

People blame BOTW but ...
The reason why BOTW was good is NOT the open world mechanics (that they themselves copied from other games)
But its pacing, offered choice of exploration and fights and most importantly its engine <:pray:1356053116260454534>
You know u can play other games Not open world yeah? U should check the indie section more <:A_pinch:1432980538536493057> Balatro and inscription is there ya know?
None of the wannabe open world game made since managed to replicate what made BOTW the success it deserved to be in my eyes
I’m curious: does this include tears of the kingdom?
It’s seems to have mixed reception

I would argue that Tears of the Kingdom is a worthy of its BOTW 2 title
It's basically the same thing but better in every way
The issue though was ...
Replayability (no hard mode) and no DLC (with the hard challenges they did bring like in BOTW)
So the issue for those who mastered BOTW is that it is easier for them to the point of being boring
It's an incredible game that is even better than the masterpiece that preceded it ... but it feels unfinished
